title: Youth justice services: North East and Cumbria
body: "YJB Head of Oversight  Contact: Akram Hussain, Head of Oversight (North East & Cumbria) Email: akram.hussain@yjb.gov.uk Phone: 07928 515124  County Durham  Contact: Leanne Hopper, Strategic Manager  County Durham Youth Justice ServiceDurham County CouncilCrook Council OfficeNorth TerraceCrookDurhamDL15 9ES   leanne.hopper@durham.gov.uk Phone: 03000 265 999  Cumberland  Contact: Simon Newling-Ward, Service Manager   Cumberland Youth Justice ServiceCumbria House107 – 117 BotchergateCarlisleCumbriaCA1 1RD   simon.newling-ward@cumberland.gov.uk Phone: 01228 227 090  Darlington  Contact: Jo Benson, Service Manager   Central House AnnexeMcNay StreetDarlingtonDL3 6JX   joanne.benson@darlington.gov.uk Phone: 01325 406 022  Gateshead  Contact: Emma Blackwell, Head of Service   Gateshead Youth Justice ServiceGateshead CouncilCivic CentreRegent StreetGatesheadNE8 1HH   emmablackwell@gateshead.gov.uk Phone: 0191 433 2764  Hartlepool  Contact: Laura Gough, Assistant Director, Children and Families   Hartlepool Youth Justice ServiceWindsor OfficesMiddleton GrangeHartlepoolTS24 7RJ   laura.gough@hartlepool.gov.uk Phone: 01429 523 986  Newcastle-upon-Tyne  Contact: Jen Dinsdale, Youth Justice Service Manager   Newcastle Youth Justice ServiceBlock 1Lower Ground FloorCivic CentreBarras BridgeCollege LaneNewcastle-upon-TyneNE1 8QH   Jen.Dinsdale@newcastle.gov.uk Phone: 0191 277 7377  North Tyneside  Contact: Pete Xeros, Service Manager   North Tyneside Youth Justice ServiceRiverside CentreMinton LaneNorth ShieldsTyne and WearNE29 6DQ   pete.xeros@northtyneside.gov.uk Phone: 0191 643 8605  Northumberland  Contact: Marie Roberts, Head of Service - Social Care and Early Help   Northumberland Adolescent ServiceCounty HallMorpethNE61 2EF   Marie.Roberts@northumberland.gov.uk Phone: 01670 536 400  South Tees  Contact: Kay Dargue, Head of Partnerships and South Tees Youth Offending Service   South Tees Youth Offending Service4th Floor, Middlesbrough HousePostal address;
